introSection: Blastin' Barrels is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Cultus Lake Adventure Park in Cultus Lake, British Columbia, Canada. It opened in 2015, along with Runaway Mine Train.
fullText:
Blastin' Barrels is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Cultus Lake Adventure Park in Cultus Lake, British Columbia, Canada. It opened in 2015, along with Runaway Mine Train.



Each row sits back-to-back.
